text.title: Solo Kpi Dashboard Template Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Solo Kpi Dashboard Template. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Dashboard shows EXACTLY 5 KPIs: signups, activation, paid conversion, churn, MRR/ARR.
rule.rationale: Dashboard shows EXACTLY 5 KPIs: signups, activation, paid conversion, churn, MRR/ARR.

rule.statement: One screen, no scrolling; vanity charts forbidden.
rule.rationale: One screen, no scrolling; vanity charts forbidden.

rule.statement: All 5 KPIs aggregate weekly; daily noise filtered.
rule.rationale: All 5 KPIs aggregate weekly; daily noise filtered.

rule.statement: Sunday review converts dashboard signal into the week's WIP-1 bet.
rule.rationale: Sunday review converts dashboard signal into the week's WIP-1 bet.

rule.statement: Each KPI carries a baseline + alert threshold; crossings trigger named action.
rule.rationale: Each KPI carries a baseline + alert threshold; crossings trigger named action.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-solo-kpi-dashboard-template.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
